title: 2026 Make-Up Artists and Hair Stylists Awards Winners
text: One Battle After Another dominated with two awards: Best Contemporary Make-Up (Heba Thorisdottir, Mandy Artusato) and Best Contemporary Hair Styling (Ahou Mofid, Gina Maria DeAngelis, Sacha Quarles). Sinners claimed two awards: Best Period and/or Character Make-Up (Ken Diaz, Siân Richards, Ned Neidhardt, Allison LaCour, Lana Mora) and Best Period and/or Character Hair Styling (Shunika Terry-Jennings, Elizabeth Robinson, Tene Wilder, Jove Edmond, Sherri B. Hamilton). Frankenstein won Best Special Make-Up Prosthetics (Mike Hill, Megan Many). Television standouts included The Studio (2 awards), Palm Royale (2 awards), Stranger Things: Season 5, Saturday Night Live, Dancing with the Stars, and Skeleton Crew. Lifetime achievements honored Greg Nelson (Make-Up) and Judy Alexander Cory (Hair Styling). The 13th Annual MUAHS Awards took place at the Westin Bonaventure Hotel with over 850 attendees.
